# PHIL.179 ? Kill Your Darlings

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** kill_your_darlings
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Be willing to abandon even beloved projects when they're not working

## Application
Assess objectively, cut losses quickly, avoid sunk cost fallacy, reallocate resources
